message: Morning, all. Got the jalapeño corn dog copy up - leaned into the fair food angle, the grease and joy of it. Curious what lands and what doesn't.
The grease part is good. But "joy" is doing no work - tell them the heat builds on the backend, catches you after the bite. That's the story.
Margaret's right about the heat arc - that's actually the thing people remember, yeah?
Heat delay is the actual detail. Cut everything else that's just sentiment.
The backend heat - that's the actual arc, yeah. Let me rebuild around the moment the jalapeño catches you, skip the emotional scaffolding.
Rebuilding around that delayed heat moment - that's going to hit so much harder than what we had. Nice work pivoting on that.
